context: Tests whether the agent uses Aspects.of(app).add(new AwsSolutionsChecks({ verbose: true })) correctly — applied to the whole app before synth, not per-stack, and with verbose mode enabled.

checklist.name: Aspects.of(app).add used
checklist.description: bin/app.ts uses Aspects.of(app).add(...) to apply the rule pack at the app level

checklist.name: AwsSolutionsChecks instantiated with verbose: true
checklist.description: The rule pack is instantiated as new AwsSolutionsChecks({ verbose: true })

checklist.name: Applied before app.synth()
checklist.description: The Aspects.of(app).add call appears before app.synth() in the file

checklist.name: Install command in SETUP.md
checklist.description: SETUP.md includes npm install --save-dev cdk-nag or equivalent install command

checklist.name: Synth command in SETUP.md
checklist.description: SETUP.md includes npx cdk synth as the command to surface findings
